name: Amplia Therapeutics Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 68% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1350, stop A$0.1040, target A$0.1500 (0.48:1) — then trail it.
